description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On February 25, 2026 at 1:07 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a pickup truck on Jerrold Avenue at Bayshore Boulevard.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northwestbound on Jerrold Avenue in the designated right turn lane when it slowed to a stop as it approached 
the intersection with Bayshore Boulevard. While the Waymo AV was stopped yielding to traffic traveling northbound on Bayshore 
Boulevard, a pickup truck traveling northwestbound on Jerrold Avenue approached the Waymo AV from behind and the front of the pickup 
truck made contact with the rear of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous 
mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
